case_title: GUSTAVO ALTAMIRANO VS. LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALTAMIRANO, GUSTAVO AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,040.00 FILED BY ALTAMIRANO, GUSTAVO AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUL-30-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF GUSTAAVO ALTAMIRANO WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOMOE CENTERS LLC WAS PRESENT AND WAS REPRESENTED BY BRAD BEMIS, ASSISTANT STORE MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDAT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALTAMIRANO, GUSTAVO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOWE'S HOME CENTERS LLC PLAINTIFF HAS ALREADY RECEIVED A JUDGMENT ON THIS CONTRACT. ALL CLAIMS RELATED TO A SINGLE CONTRACT MUST BE BROUGHT TOGETHER IN THE SAME CASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
